title: NORWAY enforcement action against Timegrip AS (21,650)
summary: Insufficient fulfilment of data subjects rights The Norwegian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 21,650 on Timegrip AS. The controller had been tracking the working hours of employees at a company that went bankrupt. A former employee requested that the controller send the working hours to the data subject so that they could claim their unpaid...
